mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders(merchant_uid, member_id, total_amount) VALUES(#{merchantUid}, #{memberId}, #{totalAmount});
INSERT INTO orderdetail(detail_quantity, merchant_uid, product_no) VALUES(#{detailQuantity}, #{merchantUid}, #{productNo});

INSERT INTO payment(merchant_uid, order_id, payment_method, payment_status, amount, paid_at, cancelled_at) VALUES(#{merchantUid}, #{orderId}, #{paymentMethod}, #{paymentStatus}, #{amount}, #{paidAt}, #{cancelledAt});

INSERT INTO shipping(order_id, recipient_name, address, phone_number, tracking_number, shipping_date, estimated_arrival) VALUES(#{orderId}, #{recipientName}, #{address}, #{phoneNumber}, #{trackingNumber}, #{shippingDate}, #{estimatedArrival});
